summary: Iteration 215 — Sprint Urgente 4 Features Testing. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 features verified — CAM Safety Gate in Executive Dashboard shows 'RISCHIO NON CONFORMITA' badge with 73.6% < 75% threshold, Pacco RINA ZIP endpoint returns valid ZIP with 5+ PDFs, CommessaHub shows 'Pacco RINA' button (data-testid='btn-pacco-rina'), Preventivatore shows CAM Safety Gate reminder with DM 23/06/2022 reference.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> - does not affect functionality (same as previous iterations)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: commessa_id=com_2c57c1283871 (NF-2026-000036) with 4 material batches containing CAM data (73.6% riciclato < 75% threshold)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 215 features fully tested. 1) CAM Safety Gate in Executive Dashboard shows danger level when commesse have <75% recycled content - endpoint GET /api/dashboard/executive returns cam_safety_gate with level, percentuale_globale, soglia, commesse, n_non_conformi. 2) Pacco RINA ZIP endpoint GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/pacco-rina returns valid ZIP with DOP, CE Label, CAM Declaration, Rintracciabilita, Riesame PDFs + 00_INDICE.txt. 3) CommessaHub shows btn-pacco-rina button for EN_1090 commesse. 4) Preventivatore shows CAM Safety Gate reminder (data-testid='cam-safety-preventivatore') in Step 3 when normativa=EN_1090.

backend_endpoints.description: Returns cam_safety_gate with level='danger', percentuale_globale=73.6, soglia=75, n_non_conformi=1, commesse list

Shows '1 COMMESSE SOTTO SOGLIA:' with NF-2026-000036 — 73.6%
Preventivatore Step 3 shows CAM Safety Gate reminder with DM 23/06/2022 reference

Returns multi-page PDF with footer 'DoP {numero} — Commessa {numero}' and 'Pag. X di Y'

CAM Declaration PDF has 'ESITO VERIFICA' stamp
DOP PDF has footer with Commessa number
DOP PDF has page numbers 'Pag. X di Y'

zip_contents_verified: 00_INDICE.txt - Index file with commessa info and file list
